description_long: This object is a standard wooden pallet, constructed from several parallel planks of light-colored, unfinished wood, spaced evenly apart on the top surface. The pallet is supported by three thick wooden beams running perpendicular underneath, creating two large open slots for forklift or pallet jack access. The sides reveal the solid block construction, with visible wood grain and natural imperfections such as knots and minor color variations. The bottom surface mirrors the top, with additional planks providing structural stability and further elevating the pallet off the ground. The overall appearance is utilitarian, designed for durability and repeated handling in industrial or urban storage environments.
description: A light-colored wooden pallet with evenly spaced planks and open slots for forklift access, designed for heavy-duty storage and transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open slots and three supporting beams beneath the top planks.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid block construction and the continuous top surface of planks.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the open slots and supporting beams.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid block construction and the flat top surface.
